pages.text: Add ectoplasm ice cubes, sweet berries, and a little sugar, and you get this delicious sundae that glows with a deep blue light.$(br)For the consumer:$(li)10 minutes of Nourishment$(li)2 minutes of Regeneration$(li)2 minutes of Frost Ward$(li)Also restores 300 Soul Energy.$(br)“Turn ectoplasm — drizzled with slimeball — into the flavor of sweet berries!”
